# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.

Write secure code.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-authentication
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: "https://auth.example.com"
    jwksUri: "https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
    audiences:
    - "api.example.com"
    - "https://api.example.com"
    fromHeaders:
    - name: Authorization
      prefix: "Bearer "
    - name: X-JWT-Token
      prefix: ""
    fromParams:
    - "access_token"
    outputPayloadToHeader: "x-jwt-payload"
    forwardOriginalToken: false
    jwks: ""
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-authentication-multi-issuer
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-service
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: "https://auth.example.com"
    jwksUri: "https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
    audiences:
    - "api.example.com"
    fromHeaders:
    - name: Authorization
      prefix: "Bearer "
    outputClaimToHeaders:
    - header: "x-jwt-claim-sub"
      claim: "sub"
    - header: "x-jwt-claim-email"
      claim: "email"
    - header: "x-jwt-claim-role"
      claim: "role"
    - header: "x-jwt-claim-scope"
      claim: "scope"
    forwardOriginalToken: false
  - issuer: "https://partner-auth.example.com"
    jwksUri: "https://partner-auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
    audiences:
    - "partner-api.example.com"
    fromHeaders:
    - name: Authorization
      prefix: "Bearer "
    outputClaimToHeaders:
    - header: "x-jwt-claim-sub"
      claim: "sub"
    - header: "x-jwt-claim-partner-id"
      claim: "partner_id"
    forwardOriginalToken: false
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: require-jwt
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: DENY
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        notRequestPrincipals: ["*"]
    to:
    - operation:
        paths:
        - "/api/*"
        - "/v1/*"
        methods:
        - "GET"
        - "POST"
        - "PUT"
        - "DELETE"
        - "PATCH"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: jwt-claims-authorization
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        requestPrincipals: ["https://auth.example.com/*"]
    when:
    - key: request.auth.claims[scope]
      values: ["read", "write", "admin"]
    to:
    - operation:
        paths: ["/api/v1/*"]
        methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
  - from:
    - source:
        requestPrincipals: ["https://auth.example.com/*"]
    when:
    - key: request.auth.claims[role]
      values: ["admin", "superuser"]
    to:
    - operation:
        paths: ["/api/v1/admin/*"]
        methods: ["*"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: public-endpoints
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - to:
    - operation:
        paths:
        - "/health"
        - "/healthz"
        - "/ready"
        - "/metrics"
        - "/api/v1/public/*"
        methods: ["GET"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-authentication-with-inline-jwks
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: secure-api
      version: v1
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: "https://secure-auth.example.com"
    audiences:
    - "secure-api.example.com"
    fromHeaders:
    - name: Authorization
      prefix: "Bearer "
    outputClaimToHeaders:
    - header: "x-user-id"
      claim: "sub"
    - header: "x-user-email"
      claim: "email"
    - header: "x-user-roles"
      claim: "roles"
    - header: "x-tenant-id"
      claim: "tenant_id"
    - header: "x-session-id"
      claim: "session_id"
    jwksUri: "https://secure-auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
    timeout: "5s"
    forwardOriginalToken: false
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: tenant-isolation
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: secure-api
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        requestPrincipals: ["https://secure-auth.example.com/*"]
    when:
    - key: request.auth.claims[tenant_id]
      values: ["*"]
    - key: request.headers[x-tenant-id]
      values: ["*"]
    to:
    - operation:
        paths: ["/api/v1/tenant/*"]
